title: 10 best herbal tinctures for burping
description: Slippery elm tinctures helps with burping because its mucilages soothe and calm the digestive tract, reducing inflammation and irritation that can lead to excessive belching. The tannins present in slippery elm also help to tone and strengthen the muscles of the esophagus and stomach, which can alleviate symptoms of acid reflux and discomfort associated with burping.
